programmes.show_description: It's high summer in Devonandtime for the guests at Crealy Theme Park & Resort to relax and let their hair down. But for the staff, there's no time to put their feet up.
For receptionist Denise, working the summer season means being constantly on the move, as she patrols the park to make sure incoming campers are pitched-up to perfection.
In London, Arthur Williams visits key sites affected by Hitler's attempt to bomb Britain into submission, from Soho to London Zoo and the iconic St Pauls, symbol of London's survival.

Jessica inherits shares in a football team and becomes embroiled in a murder case when the owner is found dead.
Jessica attends an awards ceremony for mystery writers where the abrasive host of the gala is found dead.
Jessica Fletcher and Sheriff Amos Tupper ride a bus to Portland, unaware that a murderer is also on board.
An airport accident puts Jessica in hospital with a cast on her leg - but nothing can hold back the writer's instincts when a murder is committed.
Jessica heads off for a happy reunion with her old college roommate, but the trip is marred by the death of her friend's superstar husband.
Jessica has to unravel the secrets and threats at the funeral of a friend in Wyoming.
A letter from an old friend brings Jessica to a luxury island hotel, where she arrives just in time to investigate the sender's murder.
...Possibly. Tempers flare in Cabot Cove over the planned construction of a hotel, and a tycoon with many enemies is found dead on the building site of his high-rise hotel.
Jessica's niece, who acts in a soap opera, comes under suspicion when an onscreen 'victim' is discovered to really be dead.
Jessica is about to receive a special award at Grenshaw College when she finds the proceedings interrupted by a murder.
Extraordinary abandoned relics of communist rule are uncovered, including the former Soviet Army HQ in East Germany and Tito's hidden Cold War submarine base on the island of Vis.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: In 1944, U.S. forces fought a brutal battle to seize a coral island in the Kwajalein Atoll from entrenched Japanese troops, securing a vital South Pacific military base.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: As the United States prepared for the invasion of the Philippines, scheduled for late 1944, the tiny Palau Islands had to be taken first.

programmes.show_name: How the Nazis Lost the War
programmes.show_description: Germany had few allies before WWII, and, for various reasons, those alliances were doomed to fail. Ultimately, Germany paid a heavy price for the partnerships they forged with the Axis Powers.

programmes.show_name: How the Nazis Lost the War
programmes.show_description: As Germany's resources dwindled, Hitler and Goebbels promoted Wonder Weapons as a path to victory. However, this blind belief in technology became a major hindrance to the Nazi war effort.

programmes.show_name: How the Nazis Lost the War
programmes.show_description: How did Hitler's narcotic use influence his murderous regime and delusional mindset? Did his appetite for mind-altering substances give the Allies crucial leverage in defeating the Nazi regime?
Drama series. Allie tries to kill Ferguson. Franky makes another escape attempt. Will and Kaz join forces to stop the drug trafficking. Doreen gets a wonderful surprise.

programmes.show_name: Sunken Warships: Secrets from the Deep
programmes.show_description: Formerly light cruiser USS Phoenix but sold to Argentinia after World War II, the renamed General Belgrano was controversially torpedoed during the Falklands Conflict.

programmes.show_name: Sunken Warships: Secrets from the Deep
programmes.show_description: HMS Exeter has become synonymous with bravery and sacrifice but her luck didn't last. Severely damaged by an enemy shell, she was sunk in shark-infested waters.
...Hazardous to Your Health: Crime drama starring Peter Falk and George Hamilton. The dishevelled detective is called in to investigate when a chain-smoking TV producer is found dead. (1991)
Detective drama starring Peter Falk and Patrick McGoohan. The crumpled detective must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover. (1998)
Detective drama starring Peter Falk and Barry Corbin. Columbo becomes suspicious when a millionaire's wife knows a little more than she should about a murder. (1997)
Columbo investigates the case of a woman who was murdered during an attempted robbery. (1968)
A vacation turns into a homicide investigation for Columbo when a murder takes place aboard his cruise liner. Murder mystery thriller starring Peter Falk and Robert Vaughn. (1975)

programmes.show_name: The Most Embarrassing Game Show Moments
programmes.show_description: A romp through toe-curling clips, from ludicrous answers on favourite quizzes like Family Fortunes to sheer red-face embarrassment on Saturday night's top dating shows.
Glasgow's 'cab wars' turn deadly when O'Donnell's daughter is left in a coma. A hitman arrives in the city, and Taggart races to stop the bloodshed before more lives are lost.
